steps.title: Compare slopes and intercepts
steps.content:
Both lines have slope $5$, but their $y$-intercepts are different.
$$y=5x+10$$
$$y=5x-2$$
Lines with the same slope and different intercepts are parallel.

steps.title: Count the intersections
steps.content: Parallel distinct lines do not intersect, so the graphs have zero intersection points. The answer is A.
